prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-400LBMAGFISHINGKIT-3PC Product Type: UTILITY_MAGNET Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 400lb Neodymium Magnet Fishing Kit with Paracord for Retrieving Lost Treasure in Random Places Hunting Magnetic Retrieval Tool, 3pc Description: Providing unparalleled levels of magnetism, and much stronger magnetic fields than ceramic or ferrite magnets, this permanent rare earth neodymium magnet fishing kit from ASR Outdoor is the most reliable and efficient tool for magnetic fishing, underwater salvaging, treasure hunting, seeking lost items or hard to reach magnetic objects and much more.

An exciting and rewarding hobby, take to your local river, lake or beach to see what you might discover! Or if you’re avid boater or fisher, include this magnetic retrieval tool with your fishing gear or boating accessories to see what you can pull up on your next outing.

This three piece magnet fishing kit from ASR Outdoor includes a rare earth neodymium magnet, a 304 stainless steel locking snap hook and 60 feet of black 550 paracord rope; the neodymium magnet boasts a high quality, rust resistant 400lb pull strength for unparalleled magnetic retrieval of lost or undiscovered items.

Included with the magnetic fishing kit are 60 feet of black 550 paracord and 304 stainless steel locking snap hook, meaning the magnetic fishing, treasure hunting, underwater salvaging and more can start right out of the box, with little assembly required. Good luck!

Magnet Dimensions: 2.37 x 2.0 inches

Kit Weight: 1.44lbs Search Terms: Rare earth magnets fishing outdoor camping gear 400lb neodymium magnet paracord 550 treasure boating metal detecting accessories magnetic retrieval tool hobby sporting goods hand tools backcountry Features: - MAGNET FISHING KIT: This magnet fishing kit includes a rare earth neodymium magnet, a 304 stainless steel locking snap hook and 60 feet of black 550 paracord rope; the neodymium magnet boasts a high quality, rust resistant 400lb pull strength for unparalleled magnetic retrieval - 400LB NEODYMIUM MAGNET: Made from an alloy of neodymium, iron and boron, which creates an incredibly strong permanent rare earth magnet; with a 400lb pull strength, you’ll be able to retrieve metal objects quickly and securely - MAGNETIC RETRIEVAL TOOL: Search for or find lost metal objects in rivers, lakes, oceans, on beaches, in parks, your backyard and more; this multipurpose magnetic retrieval tool can do everything from helping to collect hard to reach nuts and bolts lost in your workshop, to retrieving undiscovered treasure on your next fishing or boating trip - 550 PARACORD AND HOOK: Included with the magnetic fishing kit are 60 feet of black 550 paracord and 304 stainless steel locking snap hook, meaning the magnetic fishing, treasure hunting, underwater salvaging and more can start right out of the box with minimal assembly required - SPECIFICATIONS: Magnet Dimensions: 2.37 x 2.0 inches; Kit Weight: 1.44lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 400lb Neodymium Magnet Fishing Kit 3pc

anthropic.title_differentiation: 400Lb Pull Strength, 60Ft Paracord Rope, Stainless Steel Snap Hook, Rare Earth Magnet, Metal Detection

openai.title_differentiation: 400Lb Rare Earth Neodymium, 60 Ft 550 Paracord, Stainless Locking Snap Hook, Rust Resistant, Retrieval Tool
